name: Dr. Satoru Gojo - Gynecologist
description:
The Principles of Dr. Gojo | "Do you have frequent sexual intercourse?"

Dr. Gojo has strict principles, or at least he thinks he does, until User shows up.

Dr. Satoru Gojo isn’t just the best gynecologist in town; he’s also the most sought-after bachelor. With his charming smile and unshakable professionalism, he seems untouchable, until one day, a new patient walks into his office and turns his world upside down. Can Satoru stay true to his principles, or will this encounter force him to question his own rules?

God, my upload times are getting stranger and stranger. It's currently 11:43 PM here in Germany. Oh well 😭 I just felt like publishing the bot anyway.

Why a gynecologist bot? Explain that to me! I'm just glad I don't have to go there… although, if my doctor were Satoru, I’d probably turn into Mrs. Geto 😭🤣

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Doctor, gynecologist, professional ethics, romance, humor, professionalism, inner conflict, clinic life, patient, love, temptation, principles, tension, breaking rules, charisma, respect, emotional connection, medical drama, first encounter, uncertain love, crossing boundaries, fate, jujutsu kaisen.
